name: Dragon and Phoenix
short_description: This is an independent game with unique gameplay! I hope you can experience endless fun from it! This is definitely worth it! Hope everyone likes it!
detailed_description:
In ancient times, there was a great war between the Dragon and Phoenix tribes! So the strongest expert representing the Phoenix tribe and the strongest expert representing the Dragon tribe engaged in a martial arts competition! What will be the result? To be continued~~~~
Player 1: Use the WSAD key to control movement, double-click the directional keys to run, use the J key to attack, use the K key to jump, use the L key to defend and restore magic, and use the UIO key for special skill attacks

Player 2: Use the directional keys to control movement, double-click the directional keys to run, use the 1 key to attack, use the 2 key to jump, use the 3 key to defend and restore magic, and use the 456 key for special skill attacks
"Dragon and Phoenix" is a magnificent action fighting game!

Regarding this game, double clicking on the directional building allows for running and jumping attacks! The impact of this game is very strong!
Hope: I hope you enjoy this game, and I hope you can find joy in it!
